name: Florida
address: Clifton Building, 2661 Executive Center Circle, Tallahassee, FL 32301

steps: Vote to dissolve per operating agreement or majority of members
Wind up business affairs and settle debts
Ensure current year annual report is filed ($138.75)
File Articles of Dissolution through Sunbiz e-filing portal
File final state tax returns with Florida Department of Revenue
llc.notes: Filing through Sunbiz e-filing portal. Current year annual report ($138.75) must be filed before or with dissolution. Processing takes 2-3 business days.

steps: Board of directors adopts resolution recommending dissolution
Shareholders approve dissolution by majority vote
Wind up business affairs, notify creditors, and settle debts
Ensure current year annual report is filed ($150)
File Articles of Dissolution through Sunbiz e-filing portal or by mail
File final state tax returns with Florida Department of Revenue
corporation.notes: Filing through Sunbiz e-filing portal or by mail. Annual report must be current before dissolution.

tax.notes: Florida has no personal income tax. File final corporate income/franchise tax return (Form F-1120) if applicable. Close all sales tax and other state tax accounts.

requirements.employeeNotification: Follow federal WARN Act if 100+ employees
requirements.creditorNotification: Must notify known creditors in writing; publish notice for unknown creditors
requirements.registeredAgentNotes: Registered agent must be maintained until dissolution is complete
requirements.windingUpPeriod: Reasonable time to wind up affairs
requirements.boardOrMemberApproval: Majority vote of members (LLC) or shareholders (Corp) required

includes: Every required form with direct download links
